args.content:
# Hawaii Trip Packing List

## Clothing
- Swimwear
- Casual outfits
- Hiking gear
- Comfortable walking shoes
- Light jacket (for cooler evenings)

## Essentials
- Sunscreen
- Sunglasses
- Hat/cap
- Camera
- Phone and charger
- Travel documents (passport, ID, flight tickets, hotel reservations)

## Hiking Specific (for Diamond Head on June 13)
- Hiking shoes
- Water bottle
- Light backpack
- Snacks
- Sun protection (hat, sunscreen)

## Other Activities
- Snorkeling gear (if not renting)
- Beach towel
- Reading material
- Toiletries

## Electronics
- Phone
- Charger
- Power bank
- Camera
- Headphones

Have a wonderful trip to Hawaii!
